case_title: LUIS A SOTO VS. XIAOMIN HUANG et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-19-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---ANTHONY TAM. DEFENDANT ZHANG YE WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
